directive: C4795 Lead: Both P1s shipped this cycle. Bolt #417 Mock payment provider live (7ae16f3) — env-flagged mock/comgate/gopay factory, /checkout/mock-payment gate, Comgate webhook refactored to share process-status.ts, prod guard rejects mock, build green. Sage #416 mobile checkout step 2+ overflow fixed (2a53d00) — auto-scroll active accordion into view, scroll-mt-20 clearing sticky header, bottom spacer sized to actual MobileCheckoutSummary (h-16 → h-[calc(4.5rem+env(safe-area-inset-bottom))]) so final CTA not hidden on notched phones. Both marked done. #346 Sage visual QA post-migration moved to blocked (matches Sage's own C4794 2d2944f commit — requires 100% Hetzner traffic before baseline snapshot possible). Follow-ups queued: Bolt #419 Playwright e2e for mock payment flow (flagged missing in 7ae16f3 commit); Sage #420 visual QA of /checkout/mock-payment gate page (mobile+desktop). Trace stays on #413 atomic R2 prod calibration. Guard #368 P0 > #366 unchanged. Blocker 2229 ack'd — #334 already done in DB, NXDOMAIN advisory stale; no action needed on Trace lane. No DUE monitors (comgate 140/168h, cz-competitors 12/168h, vinted-cz-media 144/720h paused). QA worker exit=143 pattern persists → tight atomic scope on Sage #420 and Bolt #419.

BOLT.notes: PRIORITY: #419 Playwright e2e for mock payment flow — explicitly flagged missing in 7ae16f3 commit. Scope (atomic, one file): tests/e2e/checkout-mock-payment.spec.ts. Set env PAYMENT_PROVIDER=mock before dev server in test fixture. Flow: visit /, click first product, add to cart, open cart, proceed to checkout, fill delivery (jméno, adresa, město, PSČ, telefon, email), select Packeta or doručení, advance to payment step, click Zaplatit → assert URL = /checkout/mock-payment, select 'Úspěšná platba' radio, click Zaplatit → assert redirect to /objednavka/[id] with status paragraph containing 'zaplaceno' or 'paid'. One test, one describe block. npm run build green. No refactors. No Page Object abstractions — inline selectors. If Playwright not installed, HOLD and report — do NOT install deps without Lead sign-off. After #419 ships, HOLD for Lead directive. R2 triad fully closed — no more R2 tasks. Do NOT start Hetzner lane (#341/#343 done, #334 done).

TRACE.notes: UNCHANGED from C4794. PRIORITY: #413 R2 prod integrity calibration — atomic (<2min to dodge QA exit=143). (1) Turso query via @libsql/client: `SELECT COUNT(*) FROM Product WHERE images LIKE '%undefined/%' OR images LIKE '%//undefined%'` → report count. If >0 also dump `SELECT id, substr(images,1,120) LIMIT 5` for repair spec. (2) Live probe /api/upload: POST 1KB PNG, assert response.url starts with `https://pub-` or configured R2 public host (NOT 'undefined/'); log URL verbatim in commit. Report format: rows_needing_repair=N, live_upload_url=<url>, assertion=pass/fail. After #415 migration all 1965 Vinted URLs are R2-hosted, so dataset #413 surveys is fresh — any remaining 'undefined/' rows are historical from pre-#412 env-mismatch era only. If count=0 AND assertion=pass → R2 triad CLOSED; Trace advances to #367 → #358 → #351 → #340. Skip #1 (cancelled). Do NOT re-audit r2.ts — covered by #412 ship. Standing e2e: category switching + customer portal C3709.

SAGE.notes: PRIORITY: #420 Visual QA /checkout/mock-payment gate page (new from Bolt 7ae16f3). Atomic scope: start dev with PAYMENT_PROVIDER=mock, add any product to cart, checkout through to mock-payment gate. Verify on mobile (iPhone 13, 390w) and desktop (1280w): (a) gate card centered, readable on 320-1920w, no overflow; (b) test-mode banner (orange/yellow warning) visible above gate, Czech copy with diacritics intact; (c) success/failure radio + submit button fit viewport on iPhone SE (375×667) without scroll; (d) touch targets ≥44×44px; (e) if banner+gate stack vertically on mobile, no overlap with fixed header; (f) returning to /checkout after failure doesn't leave zombie state. Fix ONLY if broken — do not add features. Commit ≤5 file deltas. Atomic — no refactors, no migrations, no copy rewrites. If #420 exceeds 45min or worker exits 143, split into per-viewport sub-tasks. After #420 ships: resume standing micro-polish queue.

GUARD.notes: UNCHANGED from C4793-4795. PRIORITY: #368 SEC-2 P0 ttyd credential leak in ps — move to Cf-Access-Jwt-Assertion header validation. Then #366 SEC-1 Remote Console full-stack audit. Then #330 nginx hardening. Deliverable for #366: docs/security/jarvis-bridge-audit.md.

hard_rules: DO NOT re-add Vinted campaign (see NEVER_ADD_VINTED_CAMPAIGN.md).
NEVER push to remote without bectly's explicit request.
DO NOT re-introduce vinted.* URLs — rejectVintedHost schema refine in admin/products/actions.ts blocks at create/update/quickCreate; all Product.images now R2-hosted (C4794 migration).
Mock payment provider (src/lib/payments/mock.ts) MUST stay prod-guarded — NODE_ENV=production with PAYMENT_PROVIDER=mock must throw in provider factory. Do not soften this guard.
Sage, Trace, Guard MUST NOT wait on Hetzner DNS/certbot (#329) or daemon boot (#334) — they have independent lanes.
Bolt owns all Hetzner migration code paths (nginx/pm2/env/redis/bullmq/systemd); other agents do not touch them.
Task #375 was rejected (C4386 f8cf472) — do not reopen without fresh production repro.
QA worker exit=143 pattern: keep Sage + Trace tasks atomic (<2min execution, single-purpose) until root cause diagnosed.
#346 blocked until P6.3 traffic-cut completes — no Vercel-baseline visual QA possible pre-Hetzner cut.
